intro: This archive covers 20 articles from April 12-21, 2026, detailing a range of Windows security events. The threat actor Chaotic Eclipse was a prominent subject, as was Kyber. Coverage frequently addressed critical vulnerabilities, including CVE-2026-33104, CVE-2026-26179, and CVE-2026-32183, alongside older CVEs like CVE-2024-20662 and CVE-2024-21412. The reported incidents were predominantly high severity, with 15 such cases, alongside four medium and one critical severity event.
